title: Read a Thermistor
description: Wire a thermistor to your Arduino and log temperature values.

dialogue.text: Let's expand your sensor skills. A simple thermistor can report ambient temperature for all sorts of projects.
Connect the thermistor to an analog pin with a 10k resistor as a divider. Use the serial monitor to see the readings.
Nice job! Logging data over time will help automate your experiments.
